info.title: ConstructHub API
info.description:
ConstructHub Construction Management Platform API.

**How to use:** Click "Try it out" on any endpoint, fill in the `x-role` header field with one of: `superuser`, `project_manager`, `site_engineer`, `finance_manager`, `client`, then click Execute.

managerId.description: Manager ID associated with the project
